Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 94 

PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CTGRY_CD 

LABEL: Provider Enrollment Status Category Code 

DESCRIPTION: Groups the Provider Medicaid CHIP enrollment Status Code (PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CDCD) into 
aggregated categories. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CTGRY_CD 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CTGRY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): APR Enrollment 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider
